children.heading: Elder right
children.label: 1 Elder right
children.text: The term “elder right” means a right of an older individual.

children.heading: Vulnerable elder rights protection activity
children.label: 2 Vulnerable elder rights protection activity
children.text: The term “vulnerable elder rights protection activity” means an activity funded under part A.
